name: docs-cockpit
description: Single-plugin marketplace for docs-cockpit — markdown to HTML cockpit aggregator + status reporter.

plugins.name: docs-cockpit
plugins.description: Project module / sprint / progress dashboard in a single self-contained HTML file. Module Kanban + drawer with subtask checklist + Sprint Timeline + Concept Grid + System Docs drawer. Frontmatter-driven (modules / concepts / system_docs). state.json sidecar feeds the docs-cockpit-status skill for standup queries.
